nasb.text: Joshua struck them from Kadesh-barnea even as far as Gaza, and all the country of Goshen even as far as Gibeon.

esv.text: And Joshua struck them from Kadesh-barnea as far as Gaza, and all the country of Goshen, as far as Gibeon.

cnv.text: 約書亞從加低斯．巴尼亞擊殺他們，直到迦薩，又從歌珊全地擊殺他們，直到基遍。

ccb.text: 约书亚征服了各地，从加低斯·巴尼亚到加萨，歌珊全境，直到基遍。
